article_meta.title: Elections Unsealed Court Docs Show The FBI Probing Possible Election Crimes In Fulton County By: M.D

reasoning: Mixed quality: several strong catches from the author’s own prose (e.g., ‘propaganda press,’ ‘Trump-hating publication,’ rhetorical ‘nothing to hide’). However, it improperly flags quoted/attributed language (‘extremely sloppy’) and misses multiple clear author-level bias instances (e.g., ‘runs cover,’ ‘apologists,’ scare quotes around ‘expert,’ ‘Curious Discrepancies’). Most labels are apt; one is misapplied (Elite vs. Populist).

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: One clear violation: flagged the quoted ‘extremely sloppy’ phrase as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Primarily sound items; one false positive due to quoting. Others are genuine bias in author prose.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several notable author-prose biases: ‘runs cover,’ ‘Fulton County apologists,’ scare quotes around ‘expert,’ ‘Curious Discrepancies,’ and similar loaded framings.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Most labels fit; ‘Elite vs. Populist Bias’ for the CEIR/‘infiltrating’ line is questionable—better categorized as Mudslinging/Word Choice/Slant.
